violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Testing strips were not available for checking sanitizing solution used in 3 compartment sink. Testing strips should be available for checking sanitizing solutions are at the correct strength.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles in the storage area are acoustic style. Ceiling should be constructed of nonabsorbent, smooth, easily cleanable material.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
